- `Peppol-BIS-3.0 billing line-detail` on InvoiceLines and Invoices. That citation grounds the wire format the EU's e-invoicing network expects. The EN-16931 module (already shipped) covers the semantic model; this module covers the Peppol-specific envelope (CustomizationID + ProfileID + ParticipantIdentifier + EndpointID) so the e-invoice export service can construct a complete Peppol-compliant message without composing types from two modules in user code.` В· banner
